_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Ability to organize Active Directories (AD) hierarchy structure
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of data catalog and metadata management platforms, including active metadata principles, automated lineage tracking, and business glossary governance.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI DG domain. DG-K-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DQ-K-007 (DQ, cosine: 0.335), LS-T-009 (LS, cosine: 0.332).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 2.6/10 (raw 0.256). Shared vocabulary: [active]. DCWF-only terms [ability, ad, directories, hierarchy, organize, structure] vs WIDAI-only terms [automated, business, catalog, data, glossary, governance] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.861 (P=0.863, R=0.859). Balanced P/R — the 8-word DCWF element and 19-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.3%). "Ability to organize Active Directories (AD) hierarchy structure" and "Knowledge of data catalog and metadata management platforms, including active me" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.345 > STS 0.256 (gap +0.089). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [active] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 4.2%. Shared tokens: [active]. DCWF-only: [ability, ad, directories, hierarchy, organize, structure]. WIDAI-only: [automated, business, catalog, data, glossary, governance].
